meta.description: A feature flag — a toggle controlling feature visibility per environment or rollout
meta.keywords: feature flag toggle Split.io LaunchDarkly rollout

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_0411d6fb_3160_4db6_bd91_93c6260689b2" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "flag_key" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "platform" TEXT,
    "owner" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    "rollout_percentage" TEXT,
    "linked_tickets" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "cleanup_date" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_0411d6fb_3160_4db6_bd91_93c6260689b2" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_0411d6fb31604db6_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
